content.en:
The long years passed.

Ye Tian had been practicing quietly, but on this day, the other body in the primeval realm realm sensed that the energy of the primeval realm was rising, and the rise was not slow.

Not only that, but the Silent Black Sea, where the boundary of this area is located, has also changed, and the number of primordial antiquities here has increased, and there are more and more ancient nests.

Correspondingly, the resources of this area have also increased.

At first, Ye Tian didn't care about this situation, but as time passed, the increase became faster and faster, as if there were signs of catching up with the former Hanhai District boundary.

So, Ye Tian began to pay attention to this situation and began to investigate in this area.

Soon, Ye Tian had a guess.

"Feedback from the origin of the Hanhai District Boundary and some other factors!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The appearance of the Giant Stone Ancient Nest occupied most of the original territory of the Hanhai District, but in fact, the Hanhai District Boundary was not destroyed, it still existed, but the territory area was greatly reduced.

Moreover, the Giant Stone Ancient Nest is located in the central area of the Hanhai District Boundary, which causes the origin of the Hanhai District Boundary to be suppressed very much, and it is difficult for resources to be born.

Therefore, in this case, the area at the other end of the truncated Montenegro is also considered to be part of the Hanhai boundary, but due to the existence of the truncated Montenegro, the Hanhai boundary is divided into two.

Therefore, the area that cuts off the Montenegro area is abandoned by the origin of the Hanhai boundary.

But now, it is very likely that the origin of the Hanhai District Boundary will be moved to this area, and from this area a large regional boundary comparable to the Hanhai District boundary will be bred again.

"There should be more than that, there should be the impact of cutting off Montenegro!"

Ye Tian secretly guessed.

The truncation of Montenegro is very mysterious, and it is said that even the nine-story building did not really understand the truncation of Montenegro.

And this time, the megalithic nest also occupied a small section of the truncated Montenegro, resulting in a slight change in the truncated Montenegro.

Under the influence of many factors, the area where the Archean Plains boundary is located has undergone a great transformation.

Judging from the current situation, this metamorphosis is a good thing at the moment!

However, the Silent Black Sea has become dangerous, and almost all the Dao Ancestors in this area are Sixfold Ancestors, and it will be dangerous if you stay in the Silent Black Sea for a long time.

As a result, many Dao Ancestors joined forces and built a large number of Dao Gates, connecting the boundaries of each community.

In this way, they do not need to rush into the silent Black Sea.

However, the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor still dared to enter the Silent Black Sea to hurry, but he didn't dare to stay too long.

this day.

Another community boundary was born in this area, which attracted Ye Tian's attention.

So, Ye Tian came to the place where the community boundary was born for the first time.

"It's been a long time since a community boundary has been born in this area, but this time a community boundary was born, so shouldn't there be a community boundary one after another?"

Ye Tian muttered.

Sure enough, in the years that followed, one community after another was born, and all of them were in some nearby barren areas.

At this rate, it is really possible for this area boundary to recover to the level of the Hanhai area boundary.

However, at the moment, the Dao Ancestors on the other side of the Hanhai District Boundary have not yet discovered the situation here, after all, they did not look down on this place before.

Therefore, the information here cannot be transmitted to that side in a short time.

But the situation here will definitely not be hidden for long, and it will eventually be discovered.

Once discovered, those Dao Ancestors in the Hanhai District Boundary will probably come over and occupy the territory here.

Ye Tian wasn't worried that there would be chaos here, the arrival of those Dao Ancestors would only make this area prosperous.

However, the competition here can also become fierce.

Of course, if Ye Tian was sitting on the boundary of the Taigu Plain Region, no one would dare to occupy this place.

"There will be more and more resources in this area, but we can take the opportunity to let the Terrans occupy more treasure land!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At present, under his cultivation, the human race has also given birth to many Dao Ancestors of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor level, although they are all Dao Ancestors who have just broken through, they are also an incomparably powerful force in the Primeval Origin Domain.

Moreover, as the backer of the Terrans, other forces did not dare to compete with the Terrans at all.

So in the following years, Ye Tian marked all the newly discovered treasures in this area one by one, and then let the human race occupy them and build a gate to lead directly to these treasures.

With these treasures, the strength of the human race will become stronger and stronger!

this day.

Ye Tian discovered an ancient nest, this ancient nest was comparable to the scale of the No. 3 ancient nest in the Hanhai District, and it was newly born.

At present, all the original antiquities in this ancient nest are also a lot of resources.

So, Ye Tian entered this ancient nest and spent a little time to destroy all the original antiquities inside the ancient nest.

However, if this ancient nest is not renovated, there will still be a steady stream of original antiquities here.

And it was not difficult for Ye Tian to transform an ancient nest, he exchanged some materials and began to transform this ancient nest.

Not long after, this ancient nest was transformed by Ye Tian, and it was no longer pregnant with primordial antiquities.

There are a lot of resources inside this ancient nest, and even the value is not worse than that of the No. 3 ancient nest in the Hanhai area.

"This ancient nest can be regarded as one of the ancestral lands of the human race!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Although the boundary of the primeval plain is also very good, the resources are too scattered, and it is only a small boundary, which is hardly worth mentioning compared to this ancient nest.

So, Ye Tian moved a group of Terrans here.

In addition, a passage has been built to connect this place to the boundary of the Ancient Plains, allowing the powerhouses of the Terran to travel between the boundaries of the Ancient Plains and this ancient nest.

Another period of time has passed.

At this time, thousands of new community boundaries had been born in this area, and Dao Ancestors had already discovered the situation here in the Hanhai District Boundary, and many Dao Ancestors had moved over.

However, this area is still remote after all, and although the remaining territory of the Hanhai District Boundary is small, it has access to other major regional boundaries.

Therefore, many Dao Ancestors were still waiting and watching, and did not leave the Hanhai District boundary to come here.

As more and more Dao Ancestors came over, this area also had a new name - Truncated District Boundary!

As the reputation of cutting off the boundaries of the region spread, even the Hanhai Palace sent some Dao Ancestors over and built a giant city here, the Hanhai Giant City!

And the next news made Ye Tiandu a little surprised.

"The Nine-Story Building is going to build a Yellow Building branch at the boundary of the truncated district!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised by this.

Subsequently, he asked the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor and learned the truth from the mouth of the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor!
